items.caption: A collection of cigars, specifically habanos cigars, arranged in a row. each cigar has a label wrapped around it with the brand name "habanos" prominently displayed. the labels also feature the names of the tobacco varieties used in the cigars, such as "uday saddam hussein" and "uday saddam hussain." the cigars are in a box, and the background is out of focus, emphasizing the cigars as the main subject. the style of the image is a close-up photograph with a shallow depth of field, focusing on the cigars and their labels.
